mapper.select: SELECT notification_id, ticket_id, recipient_id, notification_type, event_key, title, content, read_status, read_time, create_time FROM ticket_notification WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, notification_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_notification WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND read_status = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_notification (ticket_id, recipient_id, notification_type, event_key, title, content, read_status, create_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{recipientId}, #{notificationType}, #{eventKey}, #{title}, #{content}, #{readStatus}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_notification SET read_status = '1', read_time = NOW() WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND read_status = '0'
UPDATE ticket_notification SET read_status = '1', read_time = NOW() WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND read_status = '0'
